requirements_addressed: Rejected targets logged to rejected.jsonl with rejection history
Transient LLM failure retry with exponential backoff
All retries exhausted: discard and continue

completion_promises.criterion_text: Sequential target processing (one at a time per ADR-ARCH-006)
completion_promises.evidence: run_generation_loop iterates over targets[start_index:] sequentially with a for loop. No concurrency (no asyncio.gather or TaskGroup). Tests verify invocation order matches sequential indices [0, 1, 2] and all targets are processed.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Player-Coach cycle with up to max_turns revisions (BDD: "Generation loop processes a target")
completion_promises.evidence: _process_single_target implements the inner loop: for turn in range(max_turns), Player generates, Coach evaluates, if accepted break, else revise with feedback. Tests verify acceptance on first turn and acceptance after revision with total_turns >= 2.

completion_promises.criterion_text: max_turns=1 gives exactly one attempt (BDD: "Generation with max_turns set to 1")
completion_promises.evidence: With max_turns=1, the inner loop runs exactly once. Tests verify: accepted case has total_turns==1; rejected case has total_turns==1 and player.ainvoke.call_count==1.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Rejected targets logged to rejected.jsonl with rejection history (BDD: "Target rejected after exhausting all turns")
completion_promises.evidence: When all turns exhausted, _build_rejection_record creates a JSON dict with 'rejection_history' containing all Coach verdict dicts. Written to output_manager.rejected_fh. Tests parse the JSON and verify 'rejection_history' key exists with correct count matching max_turns.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Per-target timeout discards and continues (BDD: "Target exceeding the per-target timeout")
completion_promises.evidence: Target processing is wrapped in asyncio.wait_for(timeout=config.target_timeout). On TimeoutError: rejected_count incremented, rejection record with reason='timeout' written to rejected_fh, pipeline continues to next target. Test uses asyncio.sleep(5) with target_timeout=1 to trigger timeout, verifies rejected>=1 and pipeline processes second target.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Transient LLM failures retried with backoff (BDD: "Transient LLM failure is retried")
completion_promises.evidence: _invoke_with_retry implements retry logic with exponential backoff (delay = backoff_base ** attempt). Catches RuntimeError, OSError, TimeoutError. Test simulates failure on first call then success on second, verifies call_count >= 2 and target accepted.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All retries exhausted: target discarded, pipeline continues (BDD: "All LLM retries exhausted")
completion_promises.evidence: When _invoke_with_retry exhausts all attempts, RuntimeError/OSError propagates to run_generation_loop where it is caught, target is rejected with reason='llm_failure: {exc}', and pipeline continues. Test simulates 3 failures (original + 2 retries) for first target, then success for second target. Verifies rejected>=1 and accepted>=1.

checkpoint.save(absolute_index) is called after each target's try/except block, regardless of outcome. Test verifies checkpoint.save.call_count == 3 for 3 targets, and assert_any_call checks indices 0, 1, 2.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Structured JSON progress logging at key milestones
completion_promises.evidence: logger.info calls emit structured messages with event prefixes: 'target_start:', 'turn_complete:', 'target_accepted:', 'target_rejected:', 'progress:' (every 50 targets), 'complete:'. Tests use caplog to verify each event type appears in log messages.

GenerationResult is a @dataclass with fields: total_targets, accepted, rejected, total_turns, elapsed_seconds. run_generation_loop returns it with computed values. Tests verify all fields, correct counts with mixed accepted/rejected, and elapsed_seconds > 0.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors
completion_promises.evidence: ruff check passes with zero errors for both entrypoint/generation_loop.py and entrypoint/tests/test_generation_loop.py. Line length <=100 (project ruff config). No unused imports.
